content.en:
Rumble!!!!!

The First Demon Venerable Demon Gu blasted the First Elder away with a single blow, and shattered one-tenth of the First Patriarch's body.

This time, the First Elder was recovering a little slower.

But the First Patriarch laughed.

"Mogu, you're defeated!"

The First Elder Road.

"Am I defeated?"

Mogu wondered.

Suddenly, figures appeared one after another around him, and six Ye Tian appeared.

This is all Ye Tian's copy body, and all of them have rushed over at this moment, and they have urged all kinds of innate primordial treasures to block the void and suppress them, so that this place is blocked, so that the First Demon Venerable Demon Gu has no way to escape.

"Ye Tian!"

Mogu recognized Ye Tian.

He had also heard about it, but he didn't pay too much attention to it, after all, Ye Tian was still very weak at that time, even if it was the thirty-fifth elder, he could be killed with a wave of his hand.

But now, Ye Tian's aura shocked him a little.

"Eternity to Taoism !!!!"

How could Ye Tian reach the Eternal Dao so quickly!

Mo Gu finally understood why those Demon Venerables were killed, why even the Demon Immortal would fall, it must have been killed by Ye Tian.

Six Eternal Dao combat power, this is the confidence of the first elder!

"Damn, I should have killed you a long time ago!"

Mogu regrets it!

But who would have thought that Ye Tian was so demonic, just like an ant, no matter how powerful he was, there was no need to go all the way to kill him!

As a result, this mole ant has grown to the point of threatening itself.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian made a move, and cast the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule of the Fifty Cheng Realm.

As soon as this Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule came out, even the First Patriarch's eyes widened.

"Ye Tian's Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules have reached at least fifty percent of the realm, and there are only a few Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items in the Void Domain, all of which have been taken away by me and the First Elder, even if Ye Tian finds another one, it is impossible to comprehend the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules to the fifty percent realm, how many Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items do you need!"

The First Patriarch thought to himself.

This was incredible, he suspected that Ye Tian was not from the Void Domain, but from a more terrifying world, otherwise there would be no way to explain it.

The First Elder was shocked, and the First Demon Venerable Demon Gu was terrified.

He found that he was not Ye Tian's opponent, one Ye Tian could hurt him, six Ye Tian besieged him together, and there was also a first elder, he was afraid that he was really going to fall here this time.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian unleashed a Gate Eternal Sequence Dao Divine Power, and the dense attacks bombarded the body of the First Demon Venerable Demon Gu, making it difficult for the First Demon Venerable to stop.

And the first patriarch on the side also attacked from time to time.

Gradually, the innate primordial treasures on the First Demon Venerable's body were scrapped, and they couldn't withstand such an attack at all.

Boom!

One of the First Demon Venerable's arms was shattered, and it was injured by the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules of the Fifty Cheng Realm, and it was difficult to recover for a while.

"Ye Tian, Yuan, let me go, I make an oath that I will never violate the Innate Origin Domain Alliance!"

Mogu said.

However, Ye Tian didn't have the slightest intention of stopping.

After a while, the First Demon Venerable was already heavily injured and was about to lose his support.

That's when it happened.

A blood-colored scale appeared on the body of the First Demon Venerable, and he activated this blood-colored scale, and his entire body seemed to be wrapped in blood-colored scales, and then turned into blood-colored light and was about to escape.

In the face of such a means, those sealed and controlled forbidden areas formed by the innate primordial treasures could not stop the First Demon Venerable.

It was at this time that the First Elder made a move.

I saw a drop of blood appear on the body of the First Elder, this was not special blood, but a treasure similar to blood, which belonged to the same grade as the blood-colored scales of the First Demon Venerable.

Airplanes!

The blood turned into a sea of blood and trapped the First Demon Venerable, making it impossible for the First Demon Venerable to escape.

"Elder Ye Tian, kill him!"

The First Elder shouted.

Ye Tian was very surprised, the First Demon Venerable and the First Elder were very deeply hidden, and there were such treasures.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian fought desperately to kill the First Demon Venerable, and under the continuous attack, the heavily injured First Demon Venerable gradually couldn't hold on.

"Yuan, let me go, otherwise the Qingyuan Country Lord will definitely punish you in the future!" the First Demon Venerable roared angrily.

The First Patriarch, however, paid no heed.

Soon.

The First Demon Venerable turned into a corpse, and the blood-colored scales became dull.

"First Elder, what are these blood-colored scales, and what is the matter with the Qingyuan Lord?"

Ye Tian was very puzzled.

The First Elder said: "Elder Ye Tian, let's kill the Supreme Dao Void Demon first, and then talk slowly!"

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian's six replica bodies went around to support and kill a famous demon lord and the demon lord.

Other than that.

A large number of patriarchs dispersed and intercepted the fleeing Supreme Void Demons in the Void Realm.

The Innate Origin Domain Alliance is striving to destroy the Supreme Dao Void Demons this time, even if it will escape a small number of Supreme Dao Void Demons, it will not be able to threaten them, and it is impossible to truly destroy them all.

After all, the Supreme Dao Void Demon is already everywhere in the Void Domain, and the Demon Gu has scattered his own blood and the blood of other Supreme Dao Void Demons to countless territories in the Void Domain, and every few years will give birth to new Supreme Dao Void Demons, and the killing will not be finished.

However, without the First Demon Venerable and the other Demon Venerables and Demon Venerables, it would be almost impossible for those Supreme Dao Void Demons to grow up, and they would not be able to pose a threat to the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, so there was nothing to fear.

After some time, all the Demon Venerables were killed, and none of them escaped.

As for the other weak Supreme Dao Void Demons, it was left to those legendary Dao Realm and the Nine Folds Dao Realm below to join forces, and Ye Tian and the other elders would not do it.

Hall of the Senate.

Ye Tian and the First Demon Venerable came here.

"First Elder, can you talk about this blood-colored scale and the Qingyuan Country Lord now?"

Ye Tian asked.

The First Elder said: "These blood-colored scales and my blood treasure are actually things left by the Qingyuan Lord, which can be used as life-saving things. This blood-colored scale can make the First Demon Venerable have an extremely terrifying escape power, and it can also allow the First Demon Venerable to devour all things and cultivate, and the cultivation speed is very fast. This drop of my blood has a one-hit killing effect, and the First Demon Venerable has always been afraid of this treasure, so he didn't dare to kill me desperately. In addition, this drop of my blood treasure also has a binding effect, which is the method I just used. "

"What about the Qingyuan Lord?"

Ye Tian asked.

The First Elder said: "The Qingyuan Country Lord is the mysterious Eternal Dao Realm powerhouse who ignited me and the First Demon Venerable, and the other party calls himself the Qingyuan Country Lord!"
